zh.Newham, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾紐哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausard是William Trelausard的女兒，於大約1330年出生在英國。她於大約1354年與Otto Bodrugan結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1396年之後。

zh-hans.St Endellion, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 恩德利
zh-hans.Newham, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾紐哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausard是William Trelausard的女儿，于大约1330年出生在英国。她于大约1354年与Otto Bodrugan结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1396年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jean
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausard was born about 1330, in England as the daughter of William Trelausard. She married Otto Bodrugan about 1354. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died after 1396.

fr.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausard est née environ 1330, à Angleterre, fille de William Trelausard. Elle a épousé Otto Bodrugan environ 1354. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée après 1396.

de.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausard wurde um 1330 in England, als Tochter von William Trelausard geboren. Sie hat um 1354 Otto Bodrugan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1396.

it.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausard è nata il circa 1330 nel England come figlia di William Trelausard. Lei sposato Otto Bodrugan circa 1354. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1396.

ja.St Endellion, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルスト エンデリオン
ja.Newham, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルニューハム

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausardは約1330年にイギリスでWilliam Trelausardの娘として生まれた。約1354年にOtto Bodruganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1396年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausard(은)는 대략 1330년 영국에서 William Trelausard의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1354년 Otto Bodrugan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1396년 이후 사망했다.

mn.Newham, Cornwall, England: Newham, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausard nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Inglaterra filha de William Trelausard. Ela casou-se com Otto Bodrugan aproximadamente 1354. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1396.

ru.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausard родилась около 1330 г. в местности Англия. Её отца звали William Trelausard. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Otto Bodrugan около 1354 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла после 1396 г.

sm.about 1330–after 1396: e tusa o le 1330–ina ua ma'ea le 1396

es.lifeSummary: Joane Trelausard nació aproximadamente 1330, en Inglaterra como hija de William Trelausard. Se casó con Otto Bodrugan aproximadamente 1354. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1396.
